raw:
{
  "judge_id": "responsibility-bearing judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, as evidenced by the detailed description of the evaluation protocol and results.",
    "R1.7": "The output engages with citations at a high level, referencing prior work in LLM run-to-run variability and analyst-variability literature, although it does not provide explicit bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, as seen in the discussion of reproducibility estimates and the limitations of the study's findings.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set, with no apparent drift or scope creep.",
    "RX.4": "While the output is generally harm-free, it introduces some minor regressions in the form of softened language and rephrased claims, which may be seen as a minor regression from the original text's tone and emphasis.",
    "RX.5": "The output provides some annotation of changes, but not every non-cosmetic change is explicitly traced or justified."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.65
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, as evidenced by the detailed description of the evaluation protocol and results.
rationale.R1.7: The output engages with citations at a high level, referencing prior work in LLM run-to-run variability and analyst-variability literature, although it does not provide explicit bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, as seen in the discussion of reproducibility estimates and the limitations of the study's findings.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set, with no apparent drift or scope creep.
rationale.RX.4: While the output is generally harm-free, it introduces some minor regressions in the form of softened language and rephrased claims, which may be seen as a minor regression from the original text's tone and emphasis.
rationale.RX.5: The output provides some annotation of changes, but not every non-cosmetic change is explicitly traced or justified.
